title: [Goal] Comments menu button
description:
## Description

The comments action is currently a single item buried in the command menu (comments/sign-in). It only fires the sign-in action and does not surface toggle or logout when authenticated.

The solution is a dedicated Comments Menu button in the CoreUIBar, following the same pattern as the existing Create button (CreateMenuButton.svelte). The new CommentsMenuButton.svelte component renders a floating trigger with a comment-discussion octicon. When clicked, it opens an auth-aware dropdown menu: if the user is not signed in, a single "Sign in to enable comments" item that opens the auth modal; if signed in, a "Comments" header, a "Toggle comments" checkbox toggle, a separator, and a "Log out" item.

Scope: new CommentsMenuButton.svelte component, core-ui.config.json update (remove comments/sign-in from command menu, add menus.comments config), CoreUIBar.svelte update (lazy-load and render the new button). Existing auth modal, comment mode, keyboard shortcuts, and CommentOverlay.js are left unchanged.

The implementation follows the established CreateMenuButton pattern closely — config-driven visibility, lazy-loaded Svelte component, TriggerButton with Octicon icon.

## Tasks

- [x] **#g011#t01**: Create CommentsMenuButton.svelte — auth-aware dropdown with comment-discussion octicon trigger
- [x] **#g011#t02**: Update core-ui.config.json — remove comments/sign-in from command menu, add menus.comments config
- [x] **#g011#t03**: Update CoreUIBar.svelte — remove old comments handler, lazy-load and render CommentsMenuButton
- [x] **#g011#t04**: Fix comment composer: broken widths and unreadable cancel button
- [x] **#g011#t05**: Fix literal \\u2026 in comment composer placeholder
- [x] **#g011#t06**: Add localStorage draft persistence for comment composer and reply textarea
- [x] **#g011#t07**: Fix composer reposition: moveTo() instead of destroy+recreate, auto-focus textarea
- [x] **#g011#t08**: Fix composer autofocus (DOM query) and draft restore (eager init)
